decisions.briefing: Markets were mixed today with the S&P 500 edging up 0.4% while the NASDAQ slipped slightly at -0.1%, signaling mild sector rotation away from mega-cap tech. With 4 open slots and $1,310 in idle cash, this is a strong opportunity to deploy into high-momentum names. I'm filling all four slots with the screener's top setups: ANDG (top score, all signals), INOD (strong momentum), CRSP (biotech breakout), and CAI (early bullish entry with volume).

market_education.summary_en: Today's session saw a mild divergence between the S&P 500 (+0.4%) and the NASDAQ (-0.1%), reflecting a quiet rotation out of high-multiple tech names into broader market sectors. With no major macro catalysts, the session was driven by lighter volume positioning ahead of upcoming economic data releases. Small- and mid-cap names with strong technicals outperformed as risk appetite remained cautiously constructive.
market_education.summary_zh: 今日美股呈現溫和分歧走勢，標普500指數小漲0.4%，那斯達克指數則微跌0.1%，反映資金從高估值科技股悄然輪動至更廣泛的市場板塊。在缺乏重大宏觀催化劑的情況下，市場以較清淡的量能運行，投資者靜待即將公布的經濟數據。技術面強勁的中小型股表現相對突出，顯示市場風險偏好仍維持謹慎樂觀的基調。

daily_lesson.explanation_en: Sector rotation is when investors move money from one sector of the market to another — for example, from high-growth tech stocks (reflected in NASDAQ) into more defensive or value-oriented sectors (reflected in the broader S&P 500). Today's split between NASDAQ (-0.1%) and S&P 500 (+0.4%) is a textbook example: tech lagged while the broader market gained, suggesting money shifted into non-tech names.
daily_lesson.explanation_zh: 板塊輪動是指投資者將資金從一個市場板塊移往另一個板塊——例如從高成長科技股（反映在那斯達克）流向更具防禦性或價值型的板塊（反映在標普500整體指數）。今日那斯達克微跌0.1%而標普500上漲0.4%，正是典型的輪動訊號：科技股落後，資金轉向非科技類股，顯示短期市場偏好正在悄然轉移。
